CustomObject.description: Configuration for generic parent-child record collection editor LWC.

fields.description: JSON describing fields to render for this use case.
fields.label: Fields JSON

fields.description: API name of the child object (e.g. Contact, OpportunityContactRole).
fields.label: Object API Name

fields.description: API name of the lookup field on the child that points to the parent (e.g. AccountId, OpportunityId).
fields.label: Parent Field API Name

fields.description: Optional. API name of the relationship/junction object to create after child records (e.g. AccountContactRelation).
fields.label: Relationship Object API Name

fields.description: Field on the relationship object for the parent Id (e.g. AccountId on AccountContactRelation).
fields.label: Relationship Parent Field

fields.description: Field on the relationship object for the child Id (e.g. ContactId on AccountContactRelation).
fields.label: Relationship Child Field

fields.description: Optional. JSON for Role field rules: { "singlePerAccountRoles": ["Principal Owner"], "requiresPermissionRoles": ["Authorized Signer"], "authorizedSignerPermission": "Onboarding_Edit_Authorized_Signer" }
fields.label: Role Constraints JSON

fields.description: JSON array of field configs for the relationship object (e.g. Role picklist on AccountContactRelation). Same structure as Fields_JSON__c.
fields.label: Relationship Fields JSON

CustomObject.label: Child Record Editor Config
